import json, re, unicodedata, sys, itertools

# Load files
q_path = '/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json'
h_path = '/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json'
with open(q_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)

with open(h_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)

len(qdata), len(hdata)

# Helper normalization: remove diacritics/tatweel/punct, unify hamza
import re, unicodedata

def normalize(s):
    s = s.replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = re.sub(r'[ًٌٍَُِّْـٰ]', '', s)  # remove tashkeel and tatweel and small alif
    s = re.sub(r'[“”"\'،؛,:._\-–—!?()\[\]{}<>«»…]', ' ', s)
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig = "وَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الطَّوفَانُ وَالسَّاعَةُ أَنْتَاهَا وَأَخَذَتْهُمُ النَّارُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي الْكُرُونِ"
n_orig = normalize(orig)
n_orig

# Search quran for substrings tokens
matches = []
for v in qdata:
    t = v.get('ayah_text','')
    n = normalize(t)
    if all(tok in n for tok in n_orig.split()[:3]):  # quick heuristic
        if any(tok in n for tok in ['طوفان','الساعة','اخذتهم','النار','اصبحوا','القرون','الكرون']):
            matches.append((v['ayah_text'], n))
len(matches)

# Broader search: look for verses containing at least two of rare tokens
cands = []
for v in qdata:
    n = normalize(v['ayah_text'])
    score = sum(int(tok in n) for tok in ['طوفان','الساعة','اخذتهم','النار','فاصبحوا','القرون','اخذت','صيحة','جاثمين','ديارهم'])
    if score>=2:
        cands.append((score, v['ayah_text']))
len(cands)

# Find verses containing "الطوفان"
res = [v['ayah_text'] for v in qdata if 'الطُّوفَان' in v['ayah_text'] or 'الطوفان' in v['ayah_text'] or 'طُوفَان' in v['ayah_text']]
res

# Get the exact ayah entry containing that phrase to copy exactly
cand = [v['ayah_text'] for v in qdata if 'وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ' in v['ayah_text']]
cand

content.text: {"correction":"وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فَلَبِثَ فِيهِمْ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا خَمْسِينَ عَامًا فَأَخَذَهُمُ الطُّوفَانُ وَهُمْ ظَالِمُونَ"}
